case_title: NCO PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT INC. VS. MODESTO LANDERITO et al

docket_entries.description: NOT FOUND OR NO SERVICE RETURN FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCO PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT INC.
